steps.title: Use the shared definition
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between the Isthmus of Suez and the Auckland Isthmus. The notes define an isthmus as a strip of land connecting two larger pieces of land across water.

steps.title: Reject partial answers
steps.content:
• Choice A gives only the general definition and does not mention both places.
  • Choice B discusses only the Auckland Isthmus.
  • Choice D discusses only the Isthmus of Suez.

steps.title: State the shared feature
steps.content: The remaining choice says both named isthmuses connect two larger pieces of land across water, so it directly emphasizes their similarity. The answer is C.
